NonZeroAgentExitCodeError: Command failed (exit 1): if [ -s ~/.nvm/nvm.sh ]; then NVM_DIR=$HOME/.nvm . ~/.nvm/nvm.sh; fi; codex exec --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox --skip-git-repo-check --model gpt-5.6-terra --json --enable unified_exec -c model_reasoning_effort=medium -- 'Remove `EditorResolution.DISABLED`
Now that the editor resolver is no longer doing any work when passing in an instance of `EditorInput` I think we should remove `EditorResolution.DISABLED`. If the intent of a component is to force open a text editor, it can still use the ID of the default association.
' 2>&1 </dev/null | tee /logs/agent/codex.txt
